name: Banana Cream Brownie Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Chop peanuts using Food Chopper.
3. Prepare brownie mix according to package directions.
4. Stir in 1/2 chopped peanuts.
5. Pour into 9-inch square baker.
6. Bake 24-27 minutes.
7. Cool completely.
8. Slice 2 bananas using Egg Slicer Plus.
9. Layer over brownie.
10. In Classic 2-quart Batter Bowl, whisk pudding mix into milk using 10-inch Whisk until mixture just begins to thicken.
11. Fold in 2 1/2 cups whipped topping using Super Scraper.
12. Quickly spread pudding mixture over sliced bananas.
13. Refrigerate for 30 minutes.
14. Sprinkle remaining 1/4 cup peanuts over pudding mixture.
15. Attach Open Star Tip to Easy Accent Decorator; fill with remaining whipped topping.
16. To serve, cut into squares using Slice "N Serve; pipe with whipped topping.
17. Grate chocolate over dessert using Cheese Grater.
18. Slice remaining banana and strawberries using Egg Slicer Plus.
19. Top each square with banana and strawberry slices.
